chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr.Misc.A.No.607 of 2023 Ghulam Shabbir.................................Applicant Vs. SSP Complaint Cell and others...........Respondents For hearing of main case 20.11.2024 Mr. Liaquat Ali Khan, advocate for the applicant. Ms. Amna Ansari, Addl. P.G. ----------- O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Applicant filed an application for registration of FIR u/s 22-A and 22-B Cr.P.C. against respondents alleging that the cheque issued by him was dishonoured. Learned counsel submits that the respondents had issued two cheques, when the first cheque was dishonoured, FIR was registered u/s 489-F PPC but subsequently when the second cheque was dishonoured and he tried to get FIR registered, it was declined. Learned Addl.P.G. has supported the impugned order. 2. I have heard the parties and perused the material available on record. It appears that two cheques were issued by the respondents in one and the same transaction, as such in the impugned order it is held that the registration of two FIRs cannot be allowed. The order is based on solid reason and findings are in accordance with law, if the applicant is still aggrieved, he may avail a remedy u/s 200 Cr.P.C. This application being devoid of merits, is accordingly dismissed. JUDGE Imran
